Step 5: (🧿 ⊗ inv(🫧)) = ((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🫧))    [by definition of ⊗]

Step 7: (🪣 ⊕ 🪣) = 🪣    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪣

Step 4: (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (🫑 ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙)))    [by inv]

Step 7: (🫑 ⊕ 🪺) = 🪺    [by ⊕ table]

Step 5: inv((🪼 ⊗ 🧄)) = inv(((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🧄))    [by definition of ⊗]

Step 7: inv((🪆 ⊕ 🧄)) = inv(🪣)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🪣) = 🧄    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧄

Step 5: inv((🧲 ⊗ 🪆)) = inv(((🧲 ⊕ 🪆) ⊕ 🧲))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(((🧲 ⊕ 🪆) ⊕ 🧲)) = inv((🪨 ⊕ 🧲))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv((🪨 ⊕ 🧲)) = inv(🧲)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🧲) = 🪨    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪨

Step 5: inv((🪺 ⊗ 🪤)) = inv(inv((🪺 ⊕ 🪤)))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(inv((🪺 ⊕ 🪤))) = inv(inv(🪤))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv(inv(🪤)) = 🪤    [by inv self-inverse property]

Step 5: (🍄 ⊕ (🪆 ⊗ inv(🪵))) = (🍄 ⊕ (🪆 ⊗ 🪵))    [by inv]
Step 6: (🍄 ⊕ (🪆 ⊗ 🪵)) = (🍄 ⊕ inv(🪆 ⊕ 🪵))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: (🍄 ⊕ inv(🪆 ⊕ 🪵)) = (🍄 ⊕ inv(🍄))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🍄 ⊕ inv(🍄)) = (🍄 ⊕ 🪨)    [by inv]
Step 9: (🍄 ⊕ 🪨) = 🪆    [by ⊕ table]

Step 5: ((🪻 ⊕ 🫧) ⊗ 🫧) = (🪻 ⊗ 🫧)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 7: ((🪻 ⊕ 🪻) ⊕ 🫧) = (🪻 ⊕ 🫧)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 6: (🪻 ⊗ (🫑 ⊕ 🧊)) = (🪻 ⊗ 🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪻 ⊗ 🧊) = ((🪻 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🪻)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 8: ((🪻 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🪻) = (🫑 ⊕ 🪻)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (🫑 ⊕ 🪻) = 🧊    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🧊

Step 4: ((🦔 ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🫑)) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: ((🦔 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = (inv((🦔 ⊕ 🪼)) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: (inv((🦔 ⊕ 🪼)) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = (inv(🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (inv(🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = (🦔 ⊕ 🦔)    [by inv]
Step 8: (🦔 ⊕ 🦔) = 🪸    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪸

Step 5: (🪵 ⊗ inv(inv(🫧))) = ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ inv(inv(🫧)))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ inv(inv(🫧))) = (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧))) = (🪵 ⊕ 🫧)    [by inv involution]
Step 8: (🪵 ⊕ 🫧) = 🪵    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪵

Step 5: inv((🧊 ⊗ 🧿)) = inv(((🧊 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🧊))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(((🧊 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🧊)) = inv((🧿 ⊕ 🧊))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv((🧿 ⊕ 🧊)) = inv(🧿)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🧿) = 🧶    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 4: (🪈 ⊗ (🪆 ⊗ 🪬)) = (🪈 ⊗ ((🪆 ⊕ 🪆) ⊕ 🪬))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 5: (🪈 ⊗ ((🪆 ⊕ 🪆) ⊕ 🪬)) = (🪈 ⊗ (🧿 ⊕ 🪬))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🪈 ⊗ (🧿 ⊕ 🪬)) = (🪈 ⊗ 🪬)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪈 ⊗ 🪬) = ((🪈 ⊕ 🪈) ⊕ 🪬)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 8: ((🪈 ⊕ 🪈) ⊕ 🪬) = (🪬 ⊕ 🪬)    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪈

Step 6: (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ inv(🫑))) = (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪨))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪨)) = (🐌 ⊗ 🫑)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🐌 ⊗ 🫑) = inv((🐌 ⊕ 🫑))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 9: inv((🐌 ⊕ 🫑)) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🪨) = 🫑    [by inv]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 5: (inv(🌵) ⊗ inv(🧲)) = (🪣 ⊗ inv(🧲))    [by inv]
Step 6: (🪣 ⊗ inv(🧲)) = (🪣 ⊗ 🧄)    [by inv]
Step 7: (🪣 ⊗ 🧄) = inv((🪣 ⊕ 🧄))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 8: inv((🪣 ⊕ 🧄)) = inv(🌵)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: inv(🌵) = 🪣    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪣

Step 4: (🪣 ⊗ (🧁 ⊗ 🧿)) = (🪣 ⊗ ((🧁 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🧁))    [by definition of ⊗]

Step 6: (🪣 ⊗ (🧿 ⊕ 🧁)) = (🪣 ⊗ 🧁)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪣 ⊗ 🧁) = ((🪣 ⊕ 🧁) ⊕ 🪣)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 8: ((🪣 ⊕ 🧁) ⊕ 🪣) = (🪣 ⊕ 🪣)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (🪣 ⊕ 🪣) = 🪣    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪣

Step 4: (🪼 ⊗ (🪼 ⊗ 🫐)) = (🪼 ⊗ ((🪼 ⊕ 🫐) ⊕ 🪼))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 5: (🪼 ⊗ ((🪼 ⊕ 🫐) ⊕ 🪼)) = (🪼 ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🪼 ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🪼)) = (🪼 ⊗ 🪼)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪼 ⊗ 🪼) = ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🪼)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 8: ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🪼) = (🦔 ⊕ 🪼)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (🦔 ⊕ 🪼) = 🫐    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫐

Step 4: (🪸 ⊕ (🪸 ⊕ (🧄 ⊕ 🪼))) = (🪸 ⊕ (🪸 ⊕ 🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: (🪸 ⊕ (🪸 ⊕ 🪼)) = (🪸 ⊕ 🪼)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🪸 ⊕ 🪼) = 🪼    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Step 5: (🪸 ⊗ (🪩 ⊕ 🍄)) = (🪸 ⊗ 🍄)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🪸 ⊗ 🍄) = ((🪸 ⊕ 🍄) ⊕ 🪸)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: ((🪸 ⊕ 🍄) ⊕ 🪸) = (🦔 ⊕ 🪸)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🦔 ⊕ 🪸) = 🦔    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🦔

Step 4: (inv(🌵) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ inv(inv(🥟)))    [by inv table]
Step 5: (🥟 ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ 🥟)    [by inv table]
Step 6: (🥟 ⊕ 🥟) = 🪺    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪺

Step 5: ((🪩 ⊕ 🪼) ⊗ 🪩) = (🫑 ⊗ 🪩)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🫑 ⊗ 🪩) = ((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🪩)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: ((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🪩) = (🦩 ⊕ 🪩)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🦩 ⊕ 🪩) = 🪼    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Step 6: (🦩 ⊛ (inv(🪭) ⊕ inv(🧁))) = (🦩 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ inv(🧁)))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🦩 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ inv(🧁))) = (🦩 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🪨))    [by inv]
Step 8: (🦩 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🪨)) = (🦩 ⊛ 🪭)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (🦩 ⊛ 🪭) = inv(🦩 ⊗ 🪭)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: inv(🦩 ⊗ 🪭) = inv(🧁)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: inv(🧁) = 🪨    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪨

Step 6: (🪻 ⊛ ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ (🪈 ⊕ 🐙))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪻 ⊛ (🪈 ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ 🪻)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🪻 ⊛ 🪻) = inv((🪻 ⊕ 🪻))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv((🪻 ⊕ 🪻)) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🪵) = 🪻    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪻

Step 6: (🪻 ⊛ ((🪩 ⊗ 🧶) ⊕ inv(🪬))) = (🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ inv(🪬)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 7: (🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ inv(🪬))) = (🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ 🪼))    [by inv table]
Step 8: (🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ 🪼)) = (🪻 ⊛ 🪬)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (🪻 ⊛ 🪬) = ((🪻 ⊗ 🪻) ⊗ 🪬)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: ((🪻 ⊗ 🪻) ⊗ 🪬) = (🪩 ⊗ 🪬)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (🪩 ⊗ 🪬) = 🪬    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪬

Step 6: (🪵 ⊛ (inv(🪨) ⊗ 🪬)) = (🪵 ⊛ (🪵 ⊗ 🪬))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🪵 ⊛ (🪵 ⊗ 🪬)) = (🪵 ⊛ 🪨)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🪵 ⊛ 🪨) = inv(🪵 ⊗ 🪨)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🪵 ⊗ 🪨) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(🪵) = 🪺    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪺

Step 6: (🐌 ⊛ (🪸 ⊛ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊛ ((🪸 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🐌))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🐌 ⊛ ((🪸 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊛ (🦎 ⊗ 🐌))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🐌 ⊛ (🦎 ⊗ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊛ 🦎)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🐌 ⊛ 🦎) = ((🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🦎)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: ((🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🦎) = (🪵 ⊗ 🦎)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊗ 🦎) = 🪵    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪵

Step 6: (🧄 ⊛ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = (🧄 ⊛ inv(🧄))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 8: (🧄 ⊛ 🧊) = inv((🧄 ⊕ 🧊))    [by definition of ⊛]

Step 10: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ ((🐌 ⊕ 🪻) ⊕ 🐌)))    [by associativity of ⊕]
Step 12: inv((🪻 ⊛ ((🐌 ⊕ 🪻) ⊕ 🐌))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 12: (🪤 ⊛ (🫑 ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ 🫑)    [by ⊗ table]

Step 10: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸)))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑)))    [by rot transformation]

Step 9: rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ 🪸) ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🫐) ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by ⊗ table]
